summary: Iteration 27 - Maestro Production Engine & Buffet Planner Testing Complete. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Production Command Center verified: date picker, lookahead selector, Generate Plan button, KPI cards (BEOs, Ingredients, Stations, Duplicates, Shortages), view tabs (Overview, Station Sheets, Purchase Orders, Timeline, Inventory), station cards (hot, butcher, cold), consolidation alerts, purchase order generation with Sysco vendor.
critical_code_review_comments: Maestro Production Engine correctly consolidates BEOs across events with duplicate detection
Station assignment rules (hot, cold, butcher, saucier) properly implemented based on category/keywords
Production timeline correctly calculates milestones (order deadline, delivery, prep start, ready on carts)
Purchase order generation integrates with seeded vendors (Sysco, US Foods, Chef's Warehouse, Local Farm Direct)
Buffet Planner 9-step calculation correctly computes: planning covers -> take rates -> guest servings -> production servings -> prepared qty -> purchase qty -> opening set & replenishment
15 buffet menu items seeded with proper category roles and defaults
Frontend Production Command Center properly wired to backend APIs with all view tabs functional
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER27_ prefixed test data: vendor TEST_ITER27_Vendor, par level test_iter27_beef, buffet plans TEST_ITER27_Buffet_Event and TEST_ITER27_Family_Buffet
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified the new Maestro Production Engine and Buffet Planner. Key endpoints: POST /api/maestro-production/generate-plan (BEO consolidation, station assignment, timeline), GET /api/maestro-production/sheets/{date} (station production sheets), POST /api/maestro-production/generate-orders/{date} (purchase orders), POST /api/maestro-production/inventory/daily-count, GET /api/maestro-production/inventory/status, POST/GET /api/maestro-production/par-levels, POST/GET /api/maestro-production/vendors, POST /api/maestro-production/commissary/transfer, GET /api/maestro-production/commissary/stock, GET /api/maestro-production/timeline/{date}. Buffet Planner: POST /api/buffet-planner/plan (9-step calculation), GET /api/buffet-planner/plans, GET /api/buffet-planner/menu-items (15 seeded items), GET /api/buffet-planner/category-defaults, GET /api/buffet-planner/policies. Frontend Production Command Center in MaestroBQT module with Production tab in sidebar.

maestro_production_tests.generate_plan_has_events: PASS - 3 events found (Johnson Wedding, TechCorp Gala, Martinez Celebration)

buffet_planner_tests.get_policies: PASS - attendance factors, overage, duration modifiers

frontend_tests.kpi_cards: PASS - BEOs=3, Ingredients=13, Stations=3, Duplicates=3, Shortages=13
frontend_tests.view_tabs: PASS - Overview, Station Sheets, Purchase Orders, Timeline, Inventory
frontend_tests.station_sheets_tab: PASS - HOT station with items and MERGED badges

maestro_production_engine.beo_consolidation: Consolidates BEOs across events with duplicate detection
maestro_production_engine.station_assignment: hot, cold, butcher, saucier based on category/keywords
maestro_production_engine.timeline_generation: Order deadline, delivery, prep start (saucier/standard), ready on carts, event start
maestro_production_engine.purchase_order_generation: Integrates with vendors, inventory, par levels, commissary
maestro_production_engine.inventory_management: Daily counts with variance flags, par level comparison
maestro_production_engine.vendor_management: 4 seeded vendors (Sysco, US Foods, Chef's Warehouse, Local Farm Direct)
maestro_production_engine.commissary_integration: Transfer between commissary and banquet kitchen

buffet_planner.9_step_calculation: covers -> take rates -> guest servings -> production -> purchase -> replenishment
buffet_planner.category_defaults: 13 category roles with base take rates, portions, overage
buffet_planner.luxury_tiers: standard, upscale, luxury, ultra_luxury with overage modifiers

frontend_production_command_center.view_tabs: Overview, Station Sheets, Purchase Orders, Timeline, Inventory
frontend_production_command_center.station_breakdown: hot, butcher, cold with item counts
